The [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederate]] '''Transport Ship''' was an aquatic [[Repulsorcraft/Legends|repulsorcraft]] used to transport troops or equipment across bodies of [[Water/Legends|water]].

{{Veh-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns]]'' {{1st}}
